side_effects.description: Red, itchy rash at injection site; rash worsens over time with increased size, redness, itchiness, lasting over one week post-injection

protocol_notes: Started injecting first vial on November 14, 2025 (same week purchased). Initial injections tolerated well; rash developed approximately one month into use. Storage: refrigerated in dark container. Injection site: below bellybutton area. Single-use needles, meticulous alcohol wiping protocol before and after vial use, and before injection site. Former nurse with strict injection hygiene. Switched suppliers after one-month mark due to worsening reaction.
